tests.name: rg-strength: self-exclusion branch self_excluded=true → refuses with exact reason+message
rg-strength: self-exclusion branch self_excluded=false → allows
rg-strength: self-exclusion branch selfExcluded undefined → allows
rg-strength: maxWagerPerSpin boundary wager === limit → ALLOWED (strict >, not >=)
rg-strength: maxWagerPerSpin boundary wager === limit+1 → REFUSED with exact reason+message
rg-strength: maxWagerPerSpin boundary wager === limit-1 → ALLOWED
rg-strength: maxWagerPerSpin boundary limit undefined → ALLOWED at any wager
rg-strength: min spin time boundary UKGC: elapsed === minMs → ALLOWED (elapsed < minMs is the refusal predicate)
rg-strength: min spin time boundary UKGC: elapsed === minMs - 1 → REFUSED
rg-strength: min spin time boundary default jurisdiction: minMs === 0 → no waiting required
rg-strength: min spin time boundary DE: elapsed === DE.minMs / 2 → REFUSED with correct delta
rg-strength: min spin time boundary first spin (lastSpinCompletedAt === 0) → time check is SKIPPED
rg-strength: maxSessionDurationMs boundary duration === limit-1 → ALLOWED
rg-strength: maxSessionDurationMs boundary duration === limit → REFUSED (>= predicate)
rg-strength: maxLossPerSession boundary netLoss === limit → REFUSED with exact reason
rg-strength: maxLossPerSession boundary netLoss === limit-1 → ALLOWED
rg-strength: maxLossPerSession boundary netWin (totalWon > totalWagered) clamps netLoss to 0 → ALLOWED
rg-strength: AML velocity flag exactly maxSpinsPerMinute spins in window → NO flag
rg-strength: AML velocity flag maxSpinsPerMinute+1 spins → flag fires with exact kind + detail
rg-strength: AML velocity flag velocity flag fires ONCE then suppressed
rg-strength: AML velocity flag window slides: spins older than 60s are dropped from velocity count
rg-strength: AML velocity flag maxSpinsPerMinute undefined → never flags
rg-strength: AML win-rate sigma totalSpins === 29 (< 30) → no sigma check fires
rg-strength: AML win-rate sigma totalSpins === 30 + extreme win rate → fires with exact kind
rg-strength: AML win-rate sigma moderate win rate within sigma threshold → no flag
rg-strength: AML win-rate sigma winRateSigmaThreshold undefined → no check
rg-strength: AML win-rate sigma sigma flag suppression: fires once even if win rate stays anomalous
rg-strength: reality check interval elapsed === interval-1 → no event
rg-strength: reality check interval elapsed === interval → event fires with full detail
rg-strength: reality check interval realityCheckIntervalMs undefined → never fires
rg-strength: session limit warning at 80% netLoss === limit * 0.80 → warning fires with exact pct
rg-strength: session limit warning at 80% netLoss === limit * 0.79 → no warning
rg-strength: session limit warning at 80% warning fires every spin while over threshold (no suppression)
rg-strength: consecutiveWins counter win > 0 increments; win === 0 resets to 0
rg-strength: consecutiveWins counter totalWins counts only wins, not non-wins
rg-strength: cash-out hold threshold amount === threshold → required=true with exact reason
rg-strength: cash-out hold threshold amount === threshold - 1 → required=false, no reason
rg-strength: cash-out hold threshold amount === threshold + 1 → required=true
rg-strength: cash-out hold threshold threshold undefined → never required
rg-strength: getState invariants fresh session: all counters zero, lastRealityCheckAt === startTime
rg-strength: getState invariants after one losing spin: totals match exactly
rg-strength: getState invariants default jurisdiction echoed back
rg-strength: getState invariants jurisdiction explicitly set is honored
rg-strength: getState invariants limits are deep-cloned (state is read-only snapshot)
rg-strength: event log event log appends every fired event
rg-strength: event log getAMLState returns a defensive copy
rg-strength: session id explicit sessionId is preserved
rg-strength: session id default uuid is non-empty and distinct between instances
W239-FINAL — uuid format invariants (line 13) uuid never contains a dot (kills `Math.random().toString(36)` mutant)
W239-FINAL — uuid format invariants (line 13) uuid length is consistent (mutant produces shorter ids)
W239-FINAL — checkSpinAllowed return-shape per branch (lines 74, 99, 111) max wager exceeded carries a numeric-containing message
W239-FINAL — checkSpinAllowed return-shape per branch (lines 74, 99, 111) max session duration reason is exact
W239-FINAL — checkSpinAllowed return-shape per branch (lines 74, 99, 111) max loss per session reason is exact
W239-FINAL — minSpin guard reason wording (lines 85, 88) min-spin refusal carries `min_spin_time_not_elapsed` reason
W239-FINAL — sigma `>` strict boundary (line 186) actualRate that yields sigma == threshold exactly does NOT fire
W239-FINAL — winRateFired idempotency over a long sequence (line 188) flag survives 100 additional sigma-triggering spins after first fire
W239-FINAL — velocityFired idempotency (line 159) velocity flag fires exactly once across 100 rapid spins
W239-FINAL — cashOutHoldRequired exact reason string (line 260) required path carries threshold value in the reason text
W239-FINAL — cashOutHoldRequired exact reason string (line 260) not-required path has NO reason field
W239-FINAL — reality_check_due event detail carries session snapshot (line 203) event detail has all four counters with correct values
W239-FINAL — session_limit_warning event detail (line 224) warning carries netLoss + limit + pct in detail
W239-FINAL — minSpin elapsed value in message (line 92) message includes the wait-time delta
W239-FINAL — applyWeightMultiplier reel-loop strict `<` (line 31) out-of-bounds index N is never touched (kills `<=` mutant via crash)
W239-FINAL — analyzeSensitivity multiplier direction asymmetry (line 70) with delta=0.5, perturbed S_W (wild) drives rtp UP, not down
W239-FINAL — solveTargetRtp converged uses strict `<` (line 171) error == tolerance exactly does NOT trigger convergence (boundary)
W239-FINAL — solveTargetRtp bracket-update direction asymmetry (line 177) high target with constant low payouts → lo bound climbs toward 10
W239-FINAL — analyzeSensitivity default delta produces non-trivial deltas (line 69) omitted delta → 0.1 default → sensitivity values are finite numbers
W239-FINAL — autoTune wild detection uses kind === "wild" (line 220) IR with explicit wild → varySymbol is the wild id (not first symbol)
W239-FINAL — autoTune wild detection uses kind === "wild" (line 220) IR with only non-wild symbols falls back to first symbol id
W239-FINAL — autoTune empty symbols + empty wild → empty varySymbol fallback (line 220) empty symbols array → varySymbol === "" → early return with iterations=0
W239-FINAL — autoTune non-weighted full early-return shape (line 206) strips IR returns the exact zero shape including iterations=0
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier multiplier=1 → weights unchanged (Math.round 1.0)
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier multiplier=2 → weights doubled (5→10)
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier multiplier=0.5 → weights halved + clamped to integer (5*0.5=2.5 → 3)
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier multiplier=0.1 → weights clamped to minimum 1
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier reelIndices=[] (empty set) → no weight changes
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier reelIndices=[2] → only reel 2 changes
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier unknown symbolId → no-op (in operator catches typo)
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier non-weighted IR mode → returned unchanged
analyzer-strength: applyWeightMultiplier returns a deep clone — original is untouched
analyzer-strength: analyzeSensitivity weighted IR → returns ≥ 1 delta per unique symbol
analyzer-strength: analyzeSensitivity non-weighted IR → empty deltas (defensive return)
analyzer-strength: analyzeSensitivity delta=0 → sensitivity is exactly 0 (avoid div by 0)
analyzer-strength: analyzeSensitivity default evalSpins=10000, delta=0.1 (opts undefined path)
analyzer-strength: analyzeSensitivity topInfluencers ≤ 5 entries, sorted by |sensitivity| descending
analyzer-strength: analyzeSensitivity topInfluencers is a copy (does not mutate deltas order)
analyzer-strength: analyzeSensitivity multiplier formula: 1 + delta (catches `1 - delta` mutant)
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection non-weighted IR → returns converged=false, iterations=0
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection default tolerance=0.001 + maxIterations=50 + evalSpins=10000
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection varyReels undefined → falls back to allReelIndices
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection varyReels=[0] → only reel 0 weights change
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection converged when |achievedRtp − target| < tolerance
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection iterations counter increments by 1 per loop (catches `iterations--` mutant)
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection achievedRtp < target → lo moves up (lo = mid). Catches > vs < swap
analyzer-strength: solveTargetRtp bisection achievedRtp > target → hi moves down
analyzer-strength: autoTune wild-symbol detection finds wild symbol by kind === "wild" (catches `!==` flip)
analyzer-strength: autoTune wild-symbol detection IR without wild symbol → falls back to first symbol
analyzer-strength: autoTune wild-symbol detection IR with empty symbols → not-converged, iterations=0
analyzer-strength: autoTune wild-symbol detection non-weighted IR → not converged
analyzer-strength: autoTune wild-symbol detection targetHitRate set → achievedHitRate is reported
analyzer-strength: autoTune wild-symbol detection targetHitRate undefined → achievedHitRate is undefined
analyzer-strength: autoTune wild-symbol detection default rtpTolerance=0.005, maxIterations=20, evalSpins=10000
W244 RG-01: maxWagerPerSpin undefined ⇒ no max_wager_exceeded refusal omitting maxWagerPerSpin allows arbitrarily large wagers
W244 RG-02: pre-first-spin lastSpinCompletedAt branch (UKGC minSpin) first ever spin with UKGC jurisdiction is allowed regardless of minMs gate
W244 RG-02: pre-first-spin lastSpinCompletedAt branch (UKGC minSpin) after first recordSpin, UKGC minSpin guard does refuse a too-fast follow-up
W244 RG-03: default jurisdiction (MIN_SPIN_MS=0) never blocks via minSpin rapid-fire spins on default jurisdiction always pass
W244 RG-03: default jurisdiction (MIN_SPIN_MS=0) never blocks via minSpin UKGC after enough elapsed time (>= minMs) also passes
W244 RG-04: maxSessionDurationMs undefined ⇒ no max_session_duration refusal long-running session without duration cap is allowed
W244 RG-05: maxLossPerSession undefined ⇒ no max_loss_session refusal huge net loss without limit configured still allows next spin
W244 RG-06: AML velocity gate requires maxSpinsPerMinute defined no maxSpinsPerMinute set ⇒ no aml_velocity_flag event ever fires
W244 RG-07: AML win-rate gate fires exactly when conditions met < 30 spins ⇒ winRateSigma never evaluated, no flag
W244 RG-07: AML win-rate gate fires exactly when conditions met ≥ 30 spins with skewed wins ⇒ flagged becomes true (kills BooleanLiteral mutant)
W244 RG-08: realityCheck event suppressed when interval undefined no reality_check_due event when realityCheckIntervalMs unset
W244 RG-09: session_limit_warning gate requires maxLossPerSession defined no warning fired when limit not configured
W244 RG-10: cashOutHoldRequired returns false when threshold undefined omitting cashOutHoldThreshold means hold never required, regardless of amount
W244 RG-10: cashOutHoldRequired returns false when threshold undefined with threshold, amount exactly equal triggers hold (boundary)
W244 RG-10: cashOutHoldRequired returns false when threshold undefined with threshold, amount below threshold does not trigger hold
W244 SENS-01: applyWeightMultiplier returns untouched clone on non-weighted IR strips IR is returned unchanged (deep clone)
W244 SENS-02: solveTargetRtp converges on a feasible target (error sign matters) targetRtp roughly matching IR baseline converges in ≤ 50 iterations
W244 SENS-03: autoTune on non-weighted IR returns the documented early-return shape strips IR returns {converged:false, achievedRtp:0, iterations:0, solvedIr:ir}
W244 SENS-04: autoTune honours explicit rtpTolerance passing rtpTolerance=0.5 (lax) converges quickly without forcing default 0.005
W244 SENS-05: autoTune detects wild symbol by kind, not by index IR with wild as last symbol still finds and uses it
W244 SENS-05: autoTune detects wild symbol by kind, not by index IR with NO wild symbol falls back to the first symbol (LP1)
RG-01: self_excluded → allow=false refuses spin when selfExcluded=true
RG-02: not excluded → allow=true allows spin when not self-excluded
RG-03: UKGC min spin time not elapsed refuses spin when elapsed < 2500ms on UKGC
RG-04: UKGC, elapsed >= 2500ms → allow=true allows spin after 2500ms elapsed on UKGC
RG-05: DE, elapsed < 5000ms → refused refuses spin when elapsed < 5000ms on DE
